compiled_state.title: fix-bug skill not triggered when user says 'investigate/fix' an issue
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
When a user says 'investigate this issue', 'fix this bug', or similar natural language without explicitly invoking /dso:fix-bug, the agent proceeds without the fix-bug skill workflow (TDD, bot-psychologist, scope-drift review). This causes inconsistent bug-fix quality — bugs fixed without the skill lack RED test, GREEN test cycle, bot-psychologist LLM-behavioral analysis, and scope-drift review. The fix-bug skill should be triggered whenever user intent matches bug investigation/fix, not just on explicit /dso:fix-bug invocations.

comments.body: Triaged (debug-everything Bug-Fix Mode): bug targets an LLM-behavioral skill/agent/prompt file. Per CLAUDE.md rule 22 and behavioral-testing-standard Rule 5, any modification requires dedicated bot-psychologist investigation and explicit user approval. DEFERRED: batch-escalating to end-of-session user review; no code change applied this session.
comments.author: Test
